case_title: BLUMENTHAL, INC. vs. GRIDLEY, ARNOLD S.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUMENTHAL, INC.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF JUN-07-1995, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER SEE EXECUTED ORDER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRIDLEY, ARNOLD S. $11,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $129.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,079.95
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUMENTHAL, INC.
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUMENTHAL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GRIDLEY, ARNOLD S.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GRIDLEY, ARNOLD S.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $12,577.48 AS TO DEFENDANT GRIDLEY, ARNOLD S.
HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUMENTHAL, INC. HEARING SET FOR JUN-07-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; P&A NOTICE OF HRG FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUMENTHAL, INC. SERVED MAY-19-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRIDLEY, ARNOLD S.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF EXECUTION FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUMENTHAL, INC.
